title: Implement an authentication and access management solution
summary: Implement an authentication and access management solution

sections.title: Implement an authentication and access management solution
sections.summary: Implement an authentication and access management solution

lessons.title: Secure Microsoft Entra users with multifactor authentication
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use multifactor authentication with Microsoft Entra ID to harden your user accounts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-aad-users-with-mfa/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure Microsoft Entra users with multifactor authentication

lessons.title: Manage user authentication
lessons.content_md:
There are multiple options for authentication in Azure AD. Learn how to implement and manage the right authentications for users based on business needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-user-authentication/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan, implement, and administer Conditional Access
lessons.content_md:
Conditional Access gives a fine granularity of control over which users and identities can do specific activities, access which resources, and how to ensure data and systems are safe—including AI agent identities managed through Microsoft Entra Agent ID.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-implement-administer-conditional-access/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan, implement, and administer Conditional Access

lessons.title: Manage Microsoft Entra Identity Protection
lessons.content_md:
Protecting a user's identity by monitoring their usage and sign-in patterns ensures a secure cloud solution. Explore how to design and implement Microsoft Entra Identity protection.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-azure-active-directory-identity-protection/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement access management for Azure resources
lessons.content_md:
Explore how to use built-in Azure roles, managed identities, and RBAC-policy to control access to Azure resources. Identity is the key to secure solutions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-access-management-for-azure-resources/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement access management for Azure resources

lessons.title: Deploy and Configure Microsoft Entra Global Secure Access
lessons.content_md:
The modern workforce transitioned from traditional office settings to working from nearly anywhere. This change in working location necessitates an identity-aware, cloud-delivered network perimeter. This identity-aware perimeter is known as Security Service Edge (SSE). The Microsoft SSE solution includes Microsoft Entra Internet Access and Microsoft Entra Private Access, collectively referred to as Global Secure Access. This solution is founded on Zero Trust principles, emphasizing least privilege, explicit verification, and an assumption of breach to ensure security in the cloud era.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-configure-microsoft-entra-global-secure-access/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy and Configure Microsoft Entra Global Secure Access

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement an authentication and access management solution
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement an authentication and access management solution**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
